items.title: BNP Paribas adds six Bitcoin, Ether ETNs for retail clients in France
items.summary: Crypto ETN adoption is spreading across Europe as banks expand offerings and the UK reopens retail access after lifting its ban.

items.summary: US authorities launched the “Operation Red Sunset” probe into Bitmain last year over potential espionage and grid risks.

items.summary_cn: 美国当局去年以潜在间谍活动和电网风险为由，对比特大陆启动了“红日落行动”调查。

items.title: Potential Bitcoin crash below $60K may delay recovery to 2027: Data
items.summary: Bitcoin’s return to all-time highs may depend on how deep the current drawdown extends, with deeper declines historically lengthening recovery times.
items.title_cn: 数据显示：比特币若跌破6万美元，复苏可能推迟至2027年

items.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs break 4-week inflow streak as capital avoids ‘directional risk’
items.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see $296 million in weekly outflows after a month-long inflow streak, as macro uncertainty keeps capital sidelined.
items.title_cn: 现货比特币ETF结束连续四周资金流入，资本回避“方向性风险”

items.title: Morgan Stanley sets 0.14% Bitcoin ETF fee, lowest in market if approved

items.title: Bitcoin’s quantum-resistance lag may become Ethereum’s bull case: Nic Carter
items.summary: Crypto entrepreneur Nic Carter claims that Bitcoin developers still have their "head in the sand" when it comes to making Bitcoin quantum-resistant, compared to Ethereum.
items.title_cn: 尼克·卡特：比特币抗量子滞后可能成为以太坊的看涨理由

items.title: Google targets 2029 post-quantum migration as threats draw nearer
items.summary: Google has urged others to accelerate post-quantum efforts as it continues to develop Willow, one of the most powerful superconducting quantum processors today.

items.title: Ethereum 'flippening' odds rise, but it won't involve Bitcoin

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment shows extreme risk-off conditions with BTC Fear & Greed at 9 (Extreme Fear), VIX spiking 18.74% to 31.05 (Extreme Panic Rising), and DXY strengthening 0.72% (Risk Off). Fed expectations remain restrictive (3.64% implied rate) while Yen weakness suggests some risk appetite divergence. News narratives are mixed with crypto-specific developments (Ethereum roadmap, quantum resistance) but overshadowed by macro concerns (oil shock, Iran war, financial instability).

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: RSI at 38.3 shows oversold conditions with extreme fear sentiment. Funding positive at 0.000038 suggests long bias but minimal. Long liquidation ($5.97M) significantly exceeds short ($1.35M) indicating retail pain. Lower wick exhaustion at 9.5% suggests limited bottom absorption. ADX at 31.3 confirms strong downtrend - don't fade. MACD histogram positive but price near recent lows.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment neutral (-0.0) but token net flow NEGATIVE (-1,091,999) suggests accumulation despite negative stablecoin flow. News shows Ethereum-specific developments (roadmap, flippening talk) but technicals weak: RSI 36.7 oversold, ADX 31.4 strong trend, upper wick exhaustion 56.5% shows selling pressure. Long liquidation massive at $7.28B vs short $1.18B - extreme retail pain.
* **Key Metric**: Negative token net flow (-1.09M) with neutral sentiment suggests accumulation during fear - bullish divergence.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment slightly negative (-0.2) with NEGATIVE token flow (-651,843) - accumulation during weakness. 1/3 buy stars, RSI 34.2 deeply oversold, ADX 43.0 very strong trend. Funding negative (-0.000056) suggests short bias. Long liquidation $1.10M vs minimal short $21k - retail longs getting wiped. Both wick exhaustions at 18.2% show balanced pressure.
* **Key Metric**: Negative funding (-0.000056) with oversold RSI (34.2) and strong ADX (43.0) - potential squeeze setup.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境显示极端避险情绪，BTC恐惧贪婪指数为9（极度恐惧），VIX飙升18.74%至31.05（极度恐慌上升），美元指数走强0.72%（避险）。美联储预期保持限制性（隐含利率3.64%），而日元走弱显示风险偏好出现分化。新闻叙事混杂，加密领域有特定进展（以太坊路线图、抗量子性），但被宏观担忧（石油冲击、伊朗战争、金融不稳定）所掩盖。

**🟠 BTC 策略（仅限合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探性建仓
* **现实核查**: RSI为38.3显示超卖状态，市场情绪极度恐惧。资金费率为正0.000038表明多头偏向但微弱。多头清算（597万美元）显著超过空头（135万美元），显示散户痛苦。下影线耗尽率9.5%表明底部吸收有限。ADX为31.3确认强劲下跌趋势 - 勿逆势操作。MACD柱状图为正但价格接近近期低点。

**🔷 ETH 策略**:
* **信号**: 持续观察
* **现实核查**: 鲸鱼情绪中性（-0.0），但代币净流出为负（-1,091,999），尽管稳定币流出为负，仍表明积累行为。新闻显示以太坊特定进展（路线图、翻转讨论），但技术面疲弱：RSI 36.7超卖，ADX 31.4趋势强劲，上影线耗尽率56.5%显示抛压。多头清算高达72.8亿美元 vs 空头1.18亿美元 - 散户极度痛苦。
* **关键指标**: 负代币净流出（-109万）配合中性情绪，表明恐惧期间的积累 - 看涨背离。

**🟣 SOL 策略**:
* **信号**: 试探性建仓
* **现实核查**: 鲸鱼情绪略负（-0.2）且代币净流出为负（-651,843） - 弱势期间的积累。买入星级1/3，RSI 34.2深度超卖，ADX 43.0趋势非常强劲。资金费率为负（-0.000056）表明空头偏向。多头清算110万美元 vs 空头仅2.1万美元 - 散户多头被清洗。上下影线耗尽率均为18.2%显示压力平衡。
* **关键指标**: 负资金费率（-0.000056）配合超卖RSI（34.2）和强劲ADX（43.0） - 潜在轧空设置。
